Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game 236 upvotes, 35 comments
  2. Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust 142 upvotes, 20 comments
  3. The Shape of Inequalities 96 upvotes, 14 comments
  4. NanoGPT Slowrun: 10x Data Efficiency with Infinite Compute 98 upvotes, 16 comments
  5. The Day I Discovered Type Design 27 upvotes, 2 comments
  6. From Oscilloscope to Wireshark: A UDP Story (2022) 76 upvotes, 17 comments
  7. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 177 upvotes, 55 comments
  8. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 314 upvotes, 106 comments
  9. Claude Code: Channels 104 upvotes, 43 comments
  10. macOS 26 breaks custom DNS settings including .internal 320 upvotes, 165 comments
  11. Be intentional about how AI changes your codebase 65 upvotes, 26 comments
  12. Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster 121 upvotes, 59 comments
  13. Astral to Join OpenAI 1210 upvotes, 749 comments
  14. “Your frustration is the product” 426 upvotes, 248 comments
  15. I turned Markdown into a protocol for generative UI 80 upvotes, 38 comments
  16. How the Turner twins are mythbusting modern technical apparel 113 upvotes, 58 comments
  17. Wayland set the Linux Desktop back by 10 years 98 upvotes, 53 comments
  18. My Random Forest Was Mostly Learning Time-to-Expiry Noise 13 upvotes, 3 comments
  19. Juggalo makeup blocks facial recognition technology (2019) 229 upvotes, 141 comments
  20. EsoLang-Bench: Evaluating Genuine Reasoning in LLMs via Esoteric Languages 57 upvotes, 28 comments
  21. Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities 48 upvotes, 23 comments
  22. Cockpit is a web-based graphical interface for servers 165 upvotes, 102 comments
  23. An update on Steam / GOG changes for OpenTTD 267 upvotes, 185 comments
  24. Clockwise acquired by Salesforce and shutting down next week 69 upvotes, 45 comments
  25. Waymo Safety Impact 213 upvotes, 210 comments
  26. Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps 489 upvotes, 574 comments
  27. Bombarding gamblers with offers greatly increases betting and gambling harm 61 upvotes, 61 comments
  28. 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches 263 upvotes, 418 comments
  29. Drugwars for the TI-82/83/83 Calculators 6 upvotes, 6 comments
  30. How many branches can your CPU predict? 15 upvotes, 28 comments

Last generated 9:30am, 20 March 2026. Source here.
